title: eryngium amethystinum
intro: Eryngium amethystinum, also known as the viper's bugloss or alkanet, is a flowering plant in the family Boraginaceae. The plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, which include its anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant effects. It is believed to have several health benefits, including reducing inflammation, improving digestion, and supporting the immune system. Eryngium amethystinum can be used in herbal preparations, such as teas, tinctures, and infusions, although its use should be approached with caution due to potential toxicity.
